title: Hair C
description: A standalone mod that lets you create a Hairstyle for your character that is completely customizable, and color-able.
body:
### Hair C Mod
#### (Forge/Fabric)
 

A standalone mod that lets you create a Hairstyle for your character that is completely customizable, and color-able.

 

Be sure to use the latest Forge version for each release!
 

#### Usage:
Craft a Scissors and Comb item
Use the item by right clicking, select Custom Hair or the Color Box


 

#### Find & Share Hairstyles:
https://hairsalon.jingames.net

 

 

#### Compatible Mod:
JinGames Years C Remastered
 

 

#### Common Question(s):
Q: Will the mod be updated/downgraded to a newer/older Forge version?

A: Maybe, but there are no fixed plans on this yet.

 

Q: Is it possible to play with this mod in older forge versions?

A: You can find some older version from 1.7.10 to 1.12.2 on it's official page here: main.jingames.net/jinryuus-hair-c/

 

#### Notes:

Mods that change the player model or add player animations aren't always compatible with Hair C.
 

#### Credits:
Creator: Tamás "JinRyuu" Nagy (Passed away)
Lead Developer: Benjámin "JinGames_Ben" Nagy
Contributor: YourDailyModder
 

#### Donate:
OUR PATREON: patreon.com/JinRyuu

SERVER DONATION: JinGames DBC Zero S Minecraft Server
